note: v402: The mobile bottom nav is now true overflow. It shows Home plus every section tab that fits (up to 6 tabs); the 'More' button only appears when there are too many to fit, and disappears entirely once they do. So if you've hidden most sections, the ones you kept (e.g. just Budget) sit right on the bar instead of being buried under More. Tab layout is computed live as you show/hide modules or rotate the device.
